title: Thriving Decades: How to Think About Aging That Keeps You Active and Engaged
excerpt: The wellness industry talks about aging like it is a disease to be delayed. Anti-aging creams, age-defying supplements, age reversal clinics charging 20k for treatments that do not work. Meanwhile, the actual research on what predicts healthy aging has been staring us in the face for decades. It is not about reversing the clock. It is about maintaining the capabilities that make life worth living.
